title: TFUGA as generative compression engine
claim: TFUGA is best treated as an engine that transforms intuition into formal objects, equations, proofs, algorithms, simulations, prototypes, and canon cells.
next_test: Create minimal axioms and one formal toy theorem

title: OAK status discipline
claim: Every module must carry a verification status separating idea, active conjecture, simulation, measurement, certified math, certified computation, certified physics, refuted, and archived.
next_test: Run all docs through claim extraction and status tagging

title: FFWT-ND as multi-scale representation
claim: Fractal and wavelet transforms can serve as the multi-scale representation layer for fields, signals, circuits, images, graphs, and simulations.
risks: May become too broad without a minimal example
next_test: Implement one 1D signal example and one 2D image example

title: HGFMnD as hypergraph representation
claim: HGFM represents theories, modules, agents, equations, tests, prototypes, risks, and links as weighted hypergraphs with OAK statuses.
evidence: README names HGFM and canon scaffold
next_test: Create minimal HGFM JSON schema and toy graph

title: CVCD compressed virtual computation
claim: Compressed signatures should reject or stabilize candidates before expensive decompression whenever possible.
next_test: Test on AIT-Primes and SAGE-GAMES toy examples

title: Trace-Det LogExp compression
claim: Iterated log/exp and trace-det identities can compress explosive costs and spectral volumes while preserving controlled decompression paths.
next_test: Write proof cell for E_n(L_n(x)) = x on valid domains

title: AIT-Primes benchmark
claim: Prime algorithms provide a clean reproducible benchmark for correctness, performance, memory, and verification discipline.
next_test: Implement prime(n), pi(x), tests, and benchmark report

title: GAIA-SAT climate impact simulator
claim: GAIA-SAT should report simulated climate impact value, not guaranteed revenue or investment value.
next_test: Create assumptions table and scenario sensitivity notebook

title: Ark-Reactor de Tristan
claim: Ark-Reactor is a modular low-power energy management, storage, routing, thermal safety, and AI control architecture, not a magical energy source.
next_test: Design low-power DC microgrid simulator and safety checklist

title: Fractal LC circuits
claim: Fractal LC networks can be studied as multi-scale resonant systems with measurable impedance, resonance, Q factor, losses, and geometry constraints.
next_test: Build SPICE/Python toy model and compare to standard LC network
